title: Passive Perception
excerpt: Passive Perception is a creature's ongoing background awareness when it is not actively using an action to search for detail.
markdown:
# Passive Perception

Passive Perception is a creature's ongoing background awareness when it is not spending time or an action on deliberate searching.

## Rules Use

Passive Perception represents what a creature can notice through ordinary alertness, routine observation, and constant low-level awareness.

## Passive Versus Active Detection

- passive awareness runs in the background without using an action
- [[search_action|Search [Action]]] represents deliberate effort to uncover something not already obvious
- passive perception is often the first threshold another effect must overcome before remaining unnoticed

## Related Concepts

Passive Perception matters when another creature tries to remain hidden, when a subtle effect competes with ordinary awareness, or when the scene contains details that should be noticed without a focused search.
